name: external-a2a-orchestrator-ts
description: Synchronous external A2A orchestrator for Care Transitions Command

scripts.pretypecheck: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const missing=['typescript','tsx','@modelcontextprotocol/sdk'].filter((pkg)=>!fs.existsSync('node_modules/'+pkg)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing dependencies: '+missing.join(', ')+'. Run: npm ci'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.smoke:release-gate: npm run typecheck && npm run smoke:runtime && npm run smoke:decision-matrix && npm run smoke:orchestrator

author: Care Transitions Command
